reasoning: Provide a brief, empathetic response and practical tips to make 5am wake-ups and 7am classes more manageable, with a short prep plan and quick morning routine ideas.
output:
You’ve got this—7am classes are rough, but you’re already proving you can handle it by getting up early. Here are a few small tweaks to make mornings smoother:

- Night-before prep:
  - lay out your outfit, pack your bag, and prep breakfast/snacks
  - set a second alarm or a backup device in case you sleep through the first one
  - decide on a simple go-to breakfast (fruit + yogurt, overnight oats, or a grab-and-go bar)

- Quick 5–10 minute morning routine:
  - splash of water on your face or a quick shower
  - 2-minute stretch to wake up your body
  - drink a glass of water, then a light bite if you can manage it
  - grab your bag and go with minimal last-minute decisions

- Sleep tips to ease wake-up:
  - try to go to bed at roughly the same time each night
  - wind down 30–60 minutes before bed (dim lights, avoid screens)

- Mental game:
  - remind yourself why you’re doing this and reward yourself after class (short break, treat)

If you want, tell me your typical wake time, commute, and what you usually eat, and I’ll tailor a super-specific plan.
